notes: Based on 15 live residential rental listings with explicit Bandar Petaling Jaya location tags found on Fazwaz on 2026-06-27. The sample is dominated by PJ Midtown and the Petaling Jaya project within Bandar Petaling Jaya. Rents span RM300 to RM2,900 per month; the mean is pulled up by two high outliers (RM1,500 and RM2,900), while the median is RM600.
